case_title: STAT LAROB COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR VS. LEONARDO MARTINEZ, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA QUALITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STAT LAROB COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT LEONARDO MARTINEZ, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA QUALITY CAR WASH JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
